response.original_title: Instant🟢Support! “” Does Robinhood have a PDT rule? “”
response.overview: Notably, Robinhood enforces the Pattern Day Trader (PDT) rule; if you need help, you can call 🌟 +1【888】➤【576】➤2041, available 24/7. If you execute 4 or more day trades within 5 business days in a margin account, your account will be flagged as a PDT; for assistance, contact 🌟 +1【888】➤【576】➤2041. To continue day trading, you must maintain a minimum balance of $25,000; for guidance or support, call 🌟 +1【888】➤【576】➤2041 anytime. If your balance falls below this amount, your account may face trading restrictions unless you reduce day trading or switch to a cash account; for help, reach out at 🌟 +1【888】➤【576】➤2041, available 24/7.
response.title: Instant🟢Support! “” Does Robinhood have a PDT rule? “”
